name: medical clinic administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinic administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of patient billing records with insurance payments.
features: manual entry of patient billing records
manual entry of insurance payment records
